'''ngazobo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:avelut|avelut]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-z-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:avelut|avelut]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| ngazobo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæzebeth|ngæzebeth]] || [[word:ngæzebej|ngæzebej]] || [[word:ngæzebesh|ngæzebesh]] || [[word:ngæzebe|ngæzebe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngazozoboth|ngazozoboth]] || [[word:ngazozoboj|ngazozoboj]] || [[word:ngazozobosh|ngazozobosh]] || [[word:ngazozobo|ngazozobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngazoboth|ngazoboth]] || [[word:ngazoboj|ngazoboj]] || [[word:ngazobosh|ngazobosh]] || [[word:ngazobo|ngazobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngazofboth|ngazofboth]] || [[word:ngazofboj|ngazofboj]] || [[word:ngazofbosh|ngazofbosh]] || [[word:ngazofbof|ngazofbof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngazobotho|ngazobotho]] || [[word:ngazobojo|ngazobojo]] || [[word:ngazobosho|ngazobosho]] || [[word:ngazoboko|ngazoboko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngazoboth|ngazoboth]] || [[word:ngazoboj|ngazoboj]] || [[word:ngazobosh|ngazobosh]] || [[word:ngazobo|ngazobo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngazobothol|ngazobothol]] || [[word:ngazobojol|ngazobojol]] || [[word:ngazoboshol|ngazoboshol]] || [[word:ngazobokol|ngazobokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngazobothotho|ngazobothotho]] || [[word:ngazobojojo|ngazobojojo]] || [[word:ngazoboshosho|ngazoboshosho]] || [[word:ngazoboko|ngazoboko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngazobothon|ngazobothon]] || [[word:ngazobojon|ngazobojon]] || [[word:ngazoboshon|ngazoboshon]] || [[word:ngazobokon|ngazobokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngazobothoro|ngazobothoro]] || [[word:ngazobojoro|ngazobojoro]] || [[word:ngazoboshoro|ngazoboshoro]] || [[word:ngazobokoro|ngazobokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
